info.name: IBM MQ REST API
info.description:
REST API for IBM MQ messaging operations including sending and receiving messages, queue management, topic management, and monitoring. Supports both administration and messaging endpoints for point-to-point and publish-subscribe patterns. The API provides two main categories: the administrative REST API for managing MQ objects and the messaging REST API for sending and receiving messages.

Contact Support:
 Name: IBM Support
